pages.text: The $(item)Sleeping Bag$() is a lightweight bedroll for adventurers on the road. It can be used as a portable bed to skip the night without needing to place a full bed block.
Craft with any three wool blocks in a row.

pages.title: Horse Bedroll
pages.text: A $(item)Sleeping Bag$() can be placed into a horse's dedicated bedroll slot, found in the horse inventory screen next to the saddle and armour slots. When equipped, the roll is visible across the horse's hindquarters.
Combine a sleeping bag with three planks to craft a standard $(item)White Bed$().
